Notes: Item group description maps directly to category name.
"GL account on which the costs of items will be booked" → Odoo expense/COGS account. Resolve via x_aa_exact_id on account.account. Depends on account.account migration (not yet mapped).
"GL account for revenue of items" → Odoo income account. Resolve via x_aa_exact_id on account.account. Depends on account.account migration (not yet mapped).
Clear semantic match: both represent the price difference account between purchase price and cost price. Depends on account.account migration (not yet mapped).
"GL account for stock entries" → Odoo stock valuation account. Clear semantic match. Depends on account.account migration (not yet mapped).
Primary key preservation (non-negotiable). Required for reconciliation, re-runs, deduplication, and relationship resolution from product.template.
Exact item group code. No native code field on product.category. Used as human-readable identifier and potential lookup key during ETL.

AMBIGUOUS: "GL Purchase account for purchase invoicing according to (non-)perpetual inventory method." In Odoo, purchase invoicing uses property_account_expense_categ_id (same target as GLCosts). Whether this equals GLCosts depends on the client's inventory method. Preserved as custom to avoid data loss. During UAT, compare values: if always identical to GLCosts, this field can be dropped. If different, may need migration logic to set the correct expense account based on inventory method.

"GL stock variance account for perpetual inventory." Odoo splits this concept into property_stock_account_input_categ_id (incoming stock moves) and property_stock_account_output_categ_id (outgoing stock moves). No 1:1 match. Preserved as custom. During account.account mapping, evaluate whether this maps to input, output, or both.

"GL account for WIP project costs." Odoo has property_stock_account_production_cost_id but it is MRP-specific (manufacturing order valuation), not general project WIP. Semantic mismatch too large for direct mapping. Preserved as custom.
"GL account for WIP project revenue." No Odoo equivalent on product.category. Preserved as custom for data completeness.

Indicates the default item group assigned to new items. No native Odoo equivalent — Odoo handles default category via ir.default/context, not a flag on the record. Preserved for migration logic: ETL can use this to set ir.default for product.template's categ_id.
Free-text notes. No native notes/description field on product.category (name is the only text field).

Exact ItemGroups are flat (no hierarchy). Set to False (root-level) during import. If business requires hierarchy, define parent assignments in a post-migration transformation based on Code patterns or business rules.

No Exact source. Odoo default is 'manual_periodic'. Set per company accounting policy. If automated inventory valuation is needed (required for GLStock → property_stock_valuation_account_id to function at runtime), set to 'real_time'. Decision needed from business.
No Exact source. Odoo default is 'standard'. Alternatives: 'average' (AVCO), 'fifo'. Set per company costing policy during migration configuration.
Denormalized code of GLCosts account. Retain in ETL scripts as fallback lookup key if GUID resolution fails against account.account.
